issue_summary: Update cancellation behaviour in DirectoryWalker to use a new CancelException, also add IOException to "lifecycle" method definitions.
javadoc_before:
/** * Overridable callback method invoked at the start of processing. *

* This implementation does nothing. * * @param startDirectory the directory to start from * @param results the collection of result objects, may be updated */
javadoc_after:
/** * Overridable callback method invoked at the start of processing. *

* This implementation does nothing. * * @param startDirectory the directory to start from * @param results the collection of result objects, may be updated * @throws IOException if an I/O Error occurs */
